feedback.text: Hey European Commission, I would very much like to suggest about adding some protection against digital products that were bought and then later on disabled/invalidated by the publisher. Big example is a video game called "The Crew" that was killing by Ubisoft. I believe that this is a trend that will continue unless a strict and direct law is introduced. I think that Digital Fairness Act can expand or touch upon that topic. Thanks a lot for your attention.
